current.next_drop_tagline: A different show. A different world. Same cadence: six pieces, capped at 250 each.
current.manifesto_body: The best shows don't announce themselves. The title card comes up, and you already know.
current.manifesto_pullquote: Shirts for the people who know the title card by heart.
current.manifesto_close: Every drop pairs a show we love with a world we come back to. One drop at a time. Capped at 250 per design. When it's gone, it's gone. The archive is in your closet.
